deck: A frank roundtable on CommCare Connect, Dimagi's biggest bet: a platform built on four pillars, Learn, Deliver, Verify, and Pay, that lets community health workers opt in to additional work and get paid for it.
seo_description: Inside CommCare Connect, Dimagi's bet to improve community health worker jobs through Learn, Deliver, Verify, and Pay, with early results from Malawi and beyond.
og_description: Inside CommCare Connect: improving health worker jobs through Learn, Deliver, Verify, and Pay.

pull_quote.text: 84 percent of the frontline workers successfully completed a full learn, deliver, verify, pay cycle on their own.
pull_quote.cite: Sarvesh Tewari, on early pilots in Malawi

bullets: The four pillars: how Learn, Deliver, Verify, and Pay (LDVP) come together to let a community health worker opt in to new services and get paid for them
Better jobs, better outcomes: why Dimagi made improving CHW jobs its top strategic priority coming out of COVID
Proof from the field: pilots in Malawi where workers autonomously completed full cycles for household safety, vaccine promotion, and early childhood development
The 90 cents goal: keeping only 10 percent for the platform so the vast majority of funding reaches the frontline worker
Earning local buy-in: working directly with locally led organizations and the surprising demand from CHWs and communities
Rethinking funding: paying only for verified delivery, cutting the heavy overhead of traditional outcomes financing
Truly opt in: why a take-it-or-leave-it model forces the product to create real value for every actor in the ecosystem

stats.label: of frontline workers completed a full learn, deliver, verify, pay cycle on their own in a Malawi pilot
verified service delivery visits delivered on the child health campaign
in funding closed in 2024 to scale up CommCare Connect

guests.name: Mercy Simiyu
guests.role: Director of Frontline Programs for CommCare Connect, with a public health background and years of work alongside CHWs from Ethiopia to Liberia.

guests.name: Sarvesh Tewari
guests.role: Director leading the program team for CommCare Connect, running pilots with frontline workers across multiple countries.

guests.name: Dhivya Sivaramakrishnan
guests.role: Leads in-share solutions delivery and the direct-to-frontline pathway, working with locally led organizations on verified service delivery.
